Login.title: WikINT
Login.descEmail: Sign in to access course materials
Login.noMethods: No authentication methods are currently enabled.
Login.codeHelp: Check your email for a sign-in link or enter the 8-character code.
Login.invalidMagicLink: Invalid magic link — no token provided.
Login.magicLinkExpired: This magic link is invalid or has expired.
Login.magicLinkExpiredDesc: The link may have expired or already been used by another device.
Login.verifySignInDesc: To finish signing in, please click the button below. This extra step helps keep your account secure.

Common.deleteItemDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
Common.commandSearchPlaceholder: Search for a command to run...
Common.shiftEnterForNewLine: Shift + Enter for a new line

Onboarding.completeProfile: Complete your profile to unlock all features
Onboarding.gdprAgree: I agree to the processing of my personal data for WikINT.
Onboarding.gdprNote: Materials I upload become platform property. See our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
Onboarding.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller for your personal data is {legalName}, located at {legalAddress}, reachable at the following email address: {contactEmail}.
controller.dpo: Data Protection Officer (DPO): in accordance with Article 37 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), a Data Protection Officer has been appointed. You can contact them at: {dpoEmail} or by mail at {dpoAddress}.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.text: WikINT collects data strictly necessary for the platform's operation and system security:

items.account: Account data: email (required for authentication), display name and avatar (optional).
items.activity: Activity data: contribution history (PRs), annotations, comments, and generated reports.
items.technical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, and connection logs (kept for security and diagnostic purposes only).

purposes.title: Purposes and Legal Basis
purposes.text: Your data is processed for the following purposes:

items.access: Access and user account management (Performance of contract/Terms of Use);
items.collaboration: Facilitating collaborative work and collective intelligence (Legitimate interest);
items.security: Platform security and detection of malicious activities (Legal obligation and Legitimate interest);

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.account: Account data: kept as long as your account is active. If deleted, personal data is erased or anonymized within 30 days.
retention.content: Contributions and content: contributions to materials (PRs, annotations) are kept permanently to maintain the integrity of the knowledge base, but are anonymized if the author's account is deleted.
retention.logs: Technical logs: kept for a maximum of 6 months.

recipients.title: Data Recipients
recipients.text: Your data is intended exclusively for WikINT administration teams. It is never sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.erasure: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten);
items.portability: Right to data portability (available via the settings tab).

rights.exercise: To exercise these rights, contact us at: {contactEmail}.
rights.complaint: If you believe your rights are not respected, you can file a complaint with the CNIL (France).

security.title: Security
security.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures (encryption, strict access control, audits) to ensure a level of security adapted to the risk.

Layout.cookieConsentMessage: We use strictly necessary cookies to keep you logged in and functional items like preferred theme. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.
Layout.offlineWarning: You appear to be offline. Some features may not work.

Home.noFavouritesYet: No favourites yet — browse and save materials you like!
Home.nothingHereYet: Nothing here yet — check back soon!
Home.helpReviewContributions: Help review these open contributions from the community
Home.popularTodaySubtitle: Most viewed materials in the last 24 hours

PendingApproval.title: Awaiting Approval
PendingApproval.description: Your account has been created and is pending review by a platform administrator.
PendingApproval.info: An administrator has been notified and will review your request shortly. You'll receive access as soon as your account is approved. No further action is required from you.

Browse.supplementaryFiles: Supplementary files linked to this material

Browse.stagedFolderDesc: Upload files or create sub-folders here. Everything will be submitted together when you create the pull request.
Browse.attachmentsDesc: Attachments are supplementary files linked to this material. They can be added via contributions.

Browse.moveItemsConfirm: Do you want to move them here? You can perform the action immediately or add it to your draft.
Browse.deletePermanentlyConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete
Browse.discardDraftConfirm: Are you sure you want to discard this staged {type}? All unsaved changes will be lost.
Browse.deleteDocumentConfirm: Are you sure you want to request the deletion of "{title}"? This will be added to your current draft.
Browse.creationCancelled: Creation cancelled and removed from draft
Browse.openContributionCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 open contribution} other {# open contributions}}
Browse.allSelectedAlreadyStagedForDeletion: All selected items are already staged for deletion
Browse.someSelectedAlreadyStagedForDeletion: Some selected items are already staged for deletion — remove the delete first
Browse.itemsCut: {count, plural, =1 {1 item} other {# items}} cut — navigate to target folder and paste
Browse.itemsAlreadyInFolder: Items are already in this folder
Browse.cannotMoveFolderIntoItself: Cannot move a folder into itself or its own subfolder
Browse.itemsAddedToDraft: {count, plural, =1 {1 item} other {# items}} added to draft
Browse.failedToDeleteItemsCount: Failed to delete {count, plural, =1 {1 item} other {# items}}
Browse.itemsDeletedSuccessfullyCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 item} other {# items}} deleted successfully

ReviewDrawer.description: Review your changes before submitting for review.

ReviewDrawer.discardDraftDescription: You are about to permanently delete {count, plural, =1 {# pending change} other {# pending changes}}. This action cannot be undone.

UploadDrawer.descFiles: Drop files or folders into {name}. Folder structure is preserved.

UploadDrawer.batchTagsHint: Tags entered here will be applied to every file and folder in this batch.

PRDetails.revertDesc: This will reverse all operations in this contribution. Created items will be deleted, deleted items will be restored, and edits will be rolled back to their state before this PR was applied.
PRDetails.revertWarning: Any edits made to affected items after this PR was approved will also be lost. This action cannot be undone.
PRDetails.revertUnderstood: I understand that this reversal is permanent and may affect changes made after this contribution
PRDetails.revertedBannerDesc: All changes from this contribution have been undone.
PRDetails.revertOfBannerDesc: This contribution undoes the changes from {link}.

featured.noItemsDesc: Click “Add Featured” to highlight a material on the home page.

dialog.titleOverridePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the material's own title

dialog.priorityDesc: Higher numbers appear first when multiple items are active.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose your preferred theme or follow system settings.

contributions.title: Contributions
contributions.description: Manage how your modifications are published on the platform.
contributions.autoApproveDesc: Your modifications are published immediately without going through a pending contribution (PR).

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a JSON archive of all your personal data including your profile, contributions, annotations, comments, and reports.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.warning1: Your account will be immediately deactivated and your personal data anonymized.
deleteAccount.warning2: Your personal data (name, email, bio) will be permanently deleted. Contributed materials remain on the platform in anonymized form as per the content license in our <link>privacy policy</link>.
deleteAccount.confirmDesc: Your account will be deactivated and personal data anonymized immediately. All personal data will be permanently deleted after 30 days. Contributed materials remain on the platform.
deleteAccount.success: Account deactivated. Data will be deleted in 30 days.

visualIdentity.title: Visual Identity
visualIdentity.description: Customize your platform's name, description, and primary theme colors.

footerLinks.title: Footer Links
footerLinks.description: Configure the links and text displayed at the bottom of every page.

legal.title: Legal & GDPR
legal.description: Information required for legal compliance and data processing transparency.

placeholders.dataTransfers: Description of data transfers outside EU

Authentication.title: Authentication
Authentication.description: Control authentication providers, allowed email domains, and access policies. Changes take effect immediately (cache TTL: 60 s).

methods.title: Authentication Methods
methods.description: Toggle which login methods are active on the platform.

totp.label: TOTP / Email codes
totp.description: Users receive a one-time code at their email address to verify identity.

google.label: Google OAuth
google.description: Allow users to sign in with their Google account.
google.clientIdRequired: You must set a Google Client ID before enabling this feature.

classic.label: Email + password (classic)
classic.description: Traditional login using email and a password.

session.title: Session Policy
session.description: Determine how long user sessions remain valid.
session.accessExpiryHelp: Short-lived token for API requests. Usually 7 days.

domains.title: Allowed Email Domains
domains.description: Emails from these domains can request access. Toggle Auto-approve to let users from that domain skip the pending queue.
domains.empty: No domains configured — fallback to default domains.

Email.title: SMTP Configuration
Email.description: Configure SMTP settings to enable email notifications and verification codes.
Email.descriptionCard: These settings are used for all outgoing emails. If left empty, the platform defaults to environment variables.

test.title: Test Connection
test.description: Send a test email to verify your SMTP settings. Save your changes before testing.
test.error: Failed to send test email. Check your SMTP settings.

Storage.title: S3 Storage Configuration
Storage.description: Configure where files are stored. Supports AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, etc.
Storage.endpointHelp: Do not include http:// or https://
Storage.maxStorageHelp: Prevents new uploads when total storage usage exceeds this value. Set to 0 or leave empty for no limit.
Storage.useSslDescription: Whether to use HTTPS for S3 operations.

limits.title: File Upload Limits
limits.description: Set maximum file sizes (MB) for different content types.

processing.title: Processing & Compression
processing.description: Optimize quality and performance for file conversions.
processing.pdfQualityTooltip: Higher quality results in sharper PDF previews but increases storage usage and processing time.
processing.videoProfileTooltip: Determines the trade-off between encoding speed and final file size.
processing.thumbnailQualityTooltip: Controls the JPEG/WebP compression of generated thumbnails.
processing.thumbnailSizeTooltip: Maximum resolution (px) for either width or height of thumbnails.

whitelist.title: Format Whitelisting
whitelist.description: Select which file formats are allowed for upload.
whitelist.overridesTooltip: Use this for exotic formats not listed above. Changes here sync with the toggles.

Layout.title: Admin Area
Layout.noPermission: You do not have permission to access the admin area.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage user roles and approve pending access requests.

dlq.title: Dead Letter Queue
dlq.description: Inspect failed background jobs, retry or dismiss them.

config.title: Configuration
config.description: Configure authentication, storage, and platform settings.

reconciliation.title: Storage Reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Compare S3-compatible storage with database records to find orphaned or missing files.

ready.title: Ready to analyze storage
ready.description: This will perform a deep scan of your S3 bucket and cross-reference with database records.

critical.title: Critical Database Inconsistency
critical.description: {count} files are referenced in the database but missing from S3 storage. These materials are currently unreachable and will fail to download or preview. Please investigate your backup or storage logs.

Users.title: User Management
Users.pendingBanner: {count, plural, =1 {# pending user} other {# pending users}} awaiting approval

reject.title: Reject and delete user?
reject.description: This will permanently delete {email}'s account. They will need to re-register if they want access.
reject.label: Reject and delete user

delete.title: Soft-delete user?
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete {email}? This action prevents login and initiates the 30-day GDPR cleanup period.
delete.label: Delete user

retry.label: Retry
retry.title: Retry job?
retry.description: Re-enqueue "{name}"? It will run again with the original payload.

dismiss.label: Dismiss
dismiss.title: Dismiss job?
dismiss.description: Mark "{name}" as resolved without retrying. This cannot be undone.

errors.load: Failed to load dead letter queue

Backup.title: Backup & Restore
Backup.description: Create snapshots of all files, directories, and pull requests. Restoring is a full replacement — current data will be overwritten.

actions.title: Create Backup
actions.rotationNote: Server keeps the last {max} backups. Oldest are deleted automatically.

save.confirmDescription: This will create a full snapshot and save it on the server. If 3 backups already exist, the oldest will be deleted.

restore.confirmDescription: This is a full replacement. All current data (files, directories, pull requests) will be overwritten. This cannot be undone.

warning.title: Warning:
warning.body: Restore is a destructive operation. Create a backup of the current state before restoring if you may need to roll back.

presentation.title: Service Presentation
presentation.text: WikINT is a collaborative platform for sharing academic resources intended for students and community members of Telecom SudParis and IMT-BS. The service is published by {legalName}, headquartered at {legalAddress}, registered under number {legalSiret}.

access.title: Access to the Service
access.text: Access to WikINT is restricted to individuals with a valid academic email address issued by a partner institution. Registration constitutes acceptance of these terms of use. Each user is responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials.

content.title: User-Contributed Content — License
content.text1: By depositing materials on WikINT (documents, files, media, comments, annotations), you retain all your copyrights to these contents, in accordance with articles L111-1 and L121-1 of the French Intellectual Property Code. The moral right to your work, inalienable and imprescriptible under French law, cannot be transferred.
content.text2: By depositing content, you grant {legalName}, for the legal duration of copyright protection as defined by article L123-1 of the Intellectual Property Code, a non-exclusive, worldwide, free, and non-transferable license to third parties, covering the following economic rights and within the limits below:
content.scope: Scope: reproduction, representation, making available, hosting, and distribution of the contributed content.
content.purpose: Purpose: operation of the WikINT platform, making it available to the academic community of partner institutions, and preserving the collective knowledge base.
content.location: Location: any medium allowing access to the WikINT service, including possible future digital variations within the scope of the same service.
content.text3: This license is granted upon the deposit of the content. It remains in effect after the deletion of your account for the sole purpose of preserving service continuity for other users, in accordance with the legitimate interest of the academic community. In the event of account deletion, your name and personal information will be dissociated from the content, which will be kept in an anonymized form. You may, before deleting your account, withdraw content you have deposited by manually deleting it from your personal space. Any content not deleted before account closure is deemed maintained for the benefit of the community under the terms of this license.
content.text4: This license does not in any way constitute a transfer of ownership. You remain the author of your works and may publish or distribute them elsewhere without restriction.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Content
prohibited.text: It is prohibited to deposit on WikINT content protected by third-party rights without authorization, counterfeit content, personal data of third parties without their consent, illicit content, or content contrary to public order. Any breach of these rules may result in the deletion of the concerned content and the suspension of the account.

availability.title: Service Availability
availability.text: WikINT is provided without any guarantee of continuous availability. {legalName} cannot be held responsible for temporary service interruptions due to maintenance operations or external causes.

modification.title: Modification of Terms
modification.text: These terms may be modified. In the event of a substantial modification, users will be informed by email at least thirty days before the new provisions take effect. Continued use of the service after this period constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

law.title: Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
law.text: These terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing an amicable resolution, the competent courts shall be those within the jurisdiction of the registered office of {legalName}.
